history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A red-tinted farewell title card with centered text and a small circular quote-like label over a blurred background of music or abstract graphic shapes.

Main Subject: The central focus is a large greeting phrase reading “SELAMAT JALAN” with additional lines of Indonesian text beneath it, plus a small white circular badge at the top center containing multiple short lines of text.

Setting: The image appears to be a stylized graphic screen or digital banner with no real-world scene; the background is a heavily blurred, reddish abstract collage of shapes and lines, with brighter circular highlights and sketch-like forms.

Visual Details: The overall color palette is deep reds and muted pinks. The background is dark red with a semi-transparent overlay, giving the entire image a tinted look. In the center, “SELAMAT JALAN” appears in large, bold, uppercase letters in bright pinkish red. Below it, “Sampai Jumpa Kembali” is shown in bold white text. Under that, a thinner white line reads “Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [1]” with “II” visible as roman numerals and square brackets around “1”. Near the bottom center is a pill-shaped button or indicator outlined in red with white text inside that reads “495 Left”. At the top center above the main heading is a circular badge with a white interior and a red outline; inside the badge are four lines of small dark text on a slightly blurred white background: “kalo”, “makan mie,” “kalo kangen”, “just call me”. The layout is symmetrical, with text centered horizontally, and the camera angle is a flat, front-facing graphic composition.

Visible Text: SELAMAT JALAN
Sampai Jumpa Kembali
Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [1]
495 Left
kalo
laper
makan mie,
kalo kangen
just call me

Practical Summary: The image is a farewell-themed digital banner with layered red background graphics and centered typography. It includes a small circular text badge near the top and a “495 Left” indicator near the bottom.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

makan mie,

just call me  

SELAMAT JALAN

Kayz x Hutao II Assisten [!]

495 Left

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
